payload.answer: That’s too broad to save as a durable personal memory. Please choose a more specific AI-related fact or preference to remember.
repair_options: Remember a specific AI preference, e.g. “I prefer concise explanations of AI concepts.”
Remember a specific AI project, e.g. “I’m working on an AI chatbot for customer support.”
Remember a specific AI learning goal, e.g. “I want to learn about transformer models.”
Remember a specific tool preference, e.g. “I use Python and PyTorch for AI experiments.”
Do not save anything for now.
